name: Creamy Cucumber Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and shred the cucumbers.
2. Combine the shredded cucumbers with the remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 2 to 48 hours to allow flavors to develop.
5. Serve chilled.
